priority: Digest, HMAC, and streaming context parity
scope: Selected upstream ext/hash rows for md2, md4, md5, GOST, MurmurHash3, sha1, SHA-2/SHA3, Tiger 3-pass, Whirlpool digests, HMAC-md5, file hashing, HKDF, PBKDF2, and stream updates
hash_file and hash_hmac_file over local files
raw binary output for file digests
MD2, MD4, GOST, sha224, SHA3, RIPEMD, Tiger 3-pass, Whirlpool, sha512/224, and sha512/256 digest/HMAC backends
Adler-32, CRC32, CRC32B, CRC32C, FNV, JOAAT, MurmurHash3, and xxHash digest backends
MurmurHash3 and xxHash seed options for hash and hash_init
next_step: Add remaining hash algorithms such as haval, tiger 4-pass variants, and snefru, plus Murmur/xxHash seed deprecations, xxHash secret diagnostics, and HashContext serialization parity before promoting the full upstream corpus.
